top_signals.title: Gold Slumps Most in 3 Weeks as Jobs Data Fuel Fed Rate-Hike Bets
top_signals.summary: Gold fell the most in three weeks as robust US jobs data fueled bets that the Federal Reserve will likely raise interest rates this year, a headwind for the precious metal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Grayscale says bitcoin needs other buyers to find a ‘sustainable bottom’ amid Strategy BTC sale
top_signals.summary: Grayscale said Strategy's ability to accumulate more bitcoin is limited at the current STRC and MSTR share prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: India Launches 85% Ethanol Fuel to Cut Oil Import Dependence
top_signals.summary: India is launching on Friday a new fuel blend with an 85% ethanol component as part of the fuel flex mobility program of the world's third-largest crude importer to reduce dependence on imported oil. The E85 fuel was officially launched at a ceremony in New Delhi in the presence of India's Minister of Petroleum and Natural Gas, Hardeep Singh Puri. On Thursday, Puri launched India's first flex-fuel passenger vehicle by Maruti Suzuki in New Delhi. Flex-fuel vehicles can operate on a range of ethanol–petrol blends, from E20 up to E100. India…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
